<audio preload="auto" id="bwc-income-sound"><source src="https://widgets.binotel.com/w/chat/14700e19e27db8da7a56.mp3" type="audio/mpeg"></audio><script>
      function bwcPlayIncomeSound() {
        const audio = document.getElementById('bwc-income-sound');
        audio.volume = 0.7;
        audio.muted = false;
        audio?.play().then().catch(() => {});
      }
      function bwcPlayNoVolumeSound() {
        const audio = document.getElementById('bwc-income-sound');
        audio.muted = true;
      } </script>
iframes.style: border: 0px !important; display: none !important; height: 0px !important; opacity: 0 !important; overflow: hidden !important; visibility: hidden !important; width: 0px !important;
